meta.source: RCL v2.223 compilation with 3+ source agreement
meta.note: Expanded to 17 ships with Voyager complete + 2 Radiance class from Grok v2.223 | Consolidated MDR variations | Added entertainment, activity, and bar venues previously classified as unknown

venues.name: Main Dining Room (MDR)
venues.description: Multi-course dinner with rotating menus. Available on all Royal Caribbean ships with different themed names (Adagio, Sapphire, Great Gatsby, etc.)

venues.name: Solarium Bistro
venues.description: Lighter breakfast and lunch in tranquil setting

venues.name: Surfside Bites
venues.description: Quick bites and snacks in Surfside family neighborhood

venues.name: Basecamp
venues.description: Casual dining with burgers and comfort food

venues.name: Izumi Sushi & Hibachi
venues.description: Japanese cuisine with sushi and teppanyaki

venues.name: Champagne Bar
venues.description: Elegant bar with bubbly and sparkling wines

venues.name: Rye & Bean
venues.description: Coffee by day, cocktails by night

venues.name: North Star Bar
venues.description: Bar near the North Star observation pod

venues.name: Boleros
venues.description: Latin-themed club with live music and dancing

venues.name: 1400 Lobby Bar
venues.description: Central lobby bar with cocktails and social atmosphere

venues.name: Point & Feather
venues.description: British-style pub with ales and pub fare

venues.name: The Lemon Post
venues.description: Casual bar venue on Icon Class ships

venues.name: Playmakers Sports Bar & Arcade
venues.description: Sports bar with arcade games and pub food

venues.name: Viking Crown Lounge
venues.description: Panoramic ocean views high above the ship

venues.name: AquaTheater
venues.description: Open-air theater with high-diving and acrobatic shows

venues.name: Two70
venues.description: Multimedia entertainment venue with wraparound screens

venues.name: The Attic
venues.description: Comedy club lounge on Royal Promenade featuring stand-up comedians and late-night adult humor shows

venues.name: Back to the Future: The Musical
Studio B
venues.description: Ice skating rink with evening shows

venues.name: Category 6 Waterpark
venues.description: Largest waterpark at sea with 6 record-breaking slides

venues.name: FlowRider
venues.description: Surf simulator with continuous wave for bodyboarding and stand-up surfing. Debuted on Freedom Class (2006) and now found on Freedom, Voyager, Oasis, Quantum, and Icon Class ships

venues.name: Splashaway Bay
venues.description: Kids water park and splash pad

venues.name: Casino Royale
venues.description: Full casino with slots and table games

venues.name: Ultimate Abyss
venues.description: Tallest slide at sea, 10 decks high

venues.name: Zip Line
venues.description: Zip line nine decks above Boardwalk

venues.name: Central Park
venues.description: Open-air park with real trees and plants

venues.name: Royal Promenade

venues.name: Thrill Island
venues.description: Adventure neighborhood with waterpark and sports

venues.name: Café Promenade
venues.description: Snacks and quick bites on the Royal Promenade

venues.name: Two70 Bar
venues.description: Bar in the Two70 entertainment venue

venues.name: SeaPlex
venues.description: Bumper cars, roller skating, circus school

venues.name: North Star
venues.description: Observation pod rising 300 feet above sea level

venues.name: R Bar
venues.description: Stylish lounge with martinis and cocktails

venues.name: Sunshine Bar
venues.description: Bright poolside bar with tropical cocktails

venues.name: Plaza Bar
venues.description: Bar on the Royal Promenade plaza

venues.name: Suite Sun Deck
venues.description: Exclusive sun deck for suite guests

venues.name: Casino
venues.description: Gaming with slots and table games

venues.description: Polynesian tiki bar with tropical cocktails

venues.name: Poolside Movies

venues.name: Whirlpools
venues.description: Hot tubs located throughout the ship including pool decks, Solarium, and adult-only areas

venues.description: Mexican cantina with tacos, burritos and margaritas

venues.description: Main show venue for Broadway-style performances

venues.description: Main show venue for Broadway-style performances

venues.description: Two-tier main show venue for Broadway-style performances

venues.name: Shall We Dance Lounge
venues.description: Lounge with dance floor for karaoke, game shows, and entertainment

venues.name: Ben & Jerry's

venues.description: Main dining room spanning two decks with elegant decor

venues.description: Two-tier main theater for Broadway-style shows and performances

venues.description: Virtual golf experience with famous courses

venues.description: Café with Asian-inspired beverages and snacks

venues.name: Amber & Oak Pub
venues.description: Traditional English/Irish gastropub (replaced Michael's Genuine Pub in 2018)

venues.description: Main dining room on Brilliance of the Seas

venues.description: Main dining room on Serenade of the Seas

venues.description: Main dining room on Vision of the Seas

venues.name: Sapphire Dining Room
venues.description: Main dining room on Explorer of the Seas

venues.name: Aurora Theater
venues.description: Main show venue on Radiance of the Seas

venues.name: Solarium Café
venues.description: Light fare in the adults-only Solarium

venues.name: Crown & Kettle
venues.description: British pub with ales and live music

venues.name: Bamboo Room
venues.description: Polynesian tiki bar with tropical cocktails

venues.name: Lost Dunes
venues.description: Themed mini golf course on Icon Class

venues.name: Navigator Dunes
venues.description: Mini golf course on Navigator of the Seas

venues.description: Two-story mini golf on Adventure of the Seas

venues.name: Freedom Fairways
venues.description: Mini golf on Freedom of the Seas

venues.name: AquaDome
venues.description: Glass-domed entertainment space housing the AquaTheater, food hall, and observation lounges with panoramic ocean views

venues.name: Hideaway Bar
venues.description: Adults-only pool bar in The Hideaway neighborhood with DJ atmosphere and the first suspended infinity pool at sea

venues.name: Thorn & Thistle
venues.description: English-style pub on Star of the Seas with live music, craft ales, and a more open layout than previous pub concepts. Located on the Royal Promenade.

venues.name: Vitality Café
venues.description: Complimentary healthy café in the Spa area offering homemade granola bars, small muffins, fresh fruit, and juices. Smoothies available with Deluxe Beverage Package.

venues.name: Butcher's Cut
venues.description: MSC's signature premium steakhouse featuring dry-aged USDA Prime beef, Australian Wagyu, and classic steakhouse sides

venues.name: Kaito Sushi Bar
venues.description: Japanese sushi bar serving fresh nigiri, sashimi, specialty rolls, and bento boxes

venues.name: Kaito Teppanyaki
venues.description: Interactive Japanese teppanyaki dining with chefs preparing multi-course meals tableside on flat-top grills

venues.name: Hola! Tacos & Cantina
venues.description: Mexican restaurant and cantina serving tacos, burritos, guacamole, and Latin-inspired dishes with tequilas and margaritas

venues.name: Ocean Cay
venues.description: Premium seafood restaurant named after MSC's private island in the Bahamas

venues.name: Le Grill
venues.description: French-inspired grill restaurant serving premium meats, seafood, and classic French dishes

venues.name: Eataly
venues.description: First Eataly at sea, exclusively on MSC World America — Italian food marketplace with fresh pasta, wood-fired pizza, and gelato

venues.name: Jean Philippe Chocolat & Café
venues.description: Artisan chocolate and pastry café by world-record-holding chocolatier Jean Philippe Maury

venues.name: Chef's Garden Kitchen
venues.description: Farm-to-table restaurant on MSC World Europa featuring seasonal produce and vegetable-forward dishes

venues.name: La Pescaderia
venues.description: Spanish-inspired seafood restaurant on MSC World Europa serving fresh catches, paella, and ceviche

venues.name: Galaxy Restaurant
venues.description: Premium specialty restaurant on MSC Divina and MSC Preziosa with elevated international cuisine

venues.name: Indochine
venues.description: Pan-Asian restaurant on MSC Virtuosa featuring Vietnamese, Thai, and Southeast Asian-inspired cuisine

venues.name: Atelier Bistrot
venues.description: French bistro-style restaurant on MSC Grandiosa serving classic French dishes and wine pairings

venues.name: La Cantina di Bacco
venues.description: Italian wine cellar restaurant on MSC Fantasia with regional Italian dishes paired with curated wines

venues.name: Venchi 1878
venues.description: Premium Italian chocolate and gelato boutique on MSC Seaside and MSC Seaview

venues.name: Le Bistrot
venues.description: French-inspired specialty restaurant on MSC Lirica

venues.name: Oriental Plaza
venues.description: Asian fusion restaurant on MSC Magnifica serving Chinese, Thai, and Japanese-inspired dishes

venues.name: Shanghai Chinese Restaurant
venues.description: Chinese specialty restaurant on MSC Orchestra with authentic Shanghai and Cantonese cuisine

venues.name: Surf & Turf
venues.description: Premium steak and seafood restaurant on MSC Armonia

venues.name: Sea Pavilion
venues.description: Asian-inspired specialty restaurant on MSC Splendida with sushi, seafood, and Far Eastern cuisine

venues.name: Caffè San Marco
venues.description: Italian-style café on MSC Armonia serving espresso, pastries, and gelato

venues.name: Gelateria Italiana
venues.description: Traditional Italian gelato parlor with handmade gelato and sorbetto

venues.name: La Boca Grill
venues.description: Complimentary Argentinian-inspired grill on MSC World America with flame-grilled meats

venues.name: Luna Park Pizza & Burger
venues.description: Complimentary casual dining on MSC World America serving hand-tossed pizza and gourmet burgers

venues.name: Promenade Bites
venues.description: Complimentary quick-service venue on MSC World America's indoor promenade

venues.name: The Harbour Bar & Bites
venues.description: Complimentary casual dining and bar on MSC World America with waterfront views

venues.name: Marketplace Buffet
venues.description: MSC's complimentary buffet with international food stations on newer ships

venues.name: Lighthouse Restaurant
venues.description: Complimentary buffet on MSC Bellissima with panoramic ocean views

venues.name: Gli Archi Buffet
venues.description: Complimentary buffet on MSC Musica with Italian-inspired decor

venues.name: La Caravella Restaurant
venues.description: Complimentary alternative dining room on MSC Opera

venues.name: L'Approdo Restaurant
venues.description: Complimentary alternative dining room on MSC Opera with Mediterranean cuisine

venues.name: Villa Verde Buffet
venues.description: Complimentary buffet on MSC Orchestra and MSC Splendida

venues.name: Villa Pompeiana Buffet

venues.description: Complimentary alternative dining room on MSC Armonia with maritime theme

venues.name: AquaTheater
venues.description: Open-air aquatic amphitheater featuring diving, acrobatic, and synchronized swimming performances

venues.name: Comedy Live
